default.title: Software Engineer
default.summary: Software Developer/Engineer with a passion for solving complex problems through elegant code. Experienced in backend development, API design, process automation, and data engineering.

backend.title: Backend Engineer
backend.summary: Backend engineer focused on API design, scalable architectures, and data engineering. Experienced with Python, Django, and relational/non-relational databases.

cli.title: Software Engineer
cli.summary: Software Engineer focused on backend development, API design, and automation.

devops.title: DevOps Engineer
devops.summary: Platform and DevOps engineer experienced in cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and automation at scale. Proficient with GCP, AWS, and container orchestration.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Engineer
fullstack.summary: Full-stack engineer comfortable across the entire web stack — from REST APIs and databases to JavaScript frontends. Experienced building and shipping end-to-end web applications.

business-card.title: Software Engineer
business-card.summary: Software Developer/Engineer focused on backend development, automation, and elegant solutions to complex problems.

hospitality.title: Hospitality Professional
hospitality.summary: Proactive hospitality professional with extensive experience in diverse F&B roles, including Server, Barista, and Banquet support. Known for strong problem-solving and multitasking abilities. Fluent in English and Spanish.

highlights.text: Worked in a team of 6+ people building an ED Platform that helped automate tasks, optimize processes, and maximize productivity
Designed and implemented a scalable server architecture and automated workflows to support hundreds of users
Collaborated with the financial department to streamline operational processes, resulting in a 10% reduction in costs and a 50% increase in efficiency
Collaborated with a team of 4+ interns and mentors to develop a website for an ISP company
Implemented a REST-API to automate data collection of the customer
Gained hands-on experience with Python, Git, Django, Web APIs and applied them to a web application

Operated the overnight In-Room Dining shift independently, taking orders and delivering room service to white-glove luxury standards, coordinating with the kitchen for food and the bar for cocktails until midnight, then personally managing sparkling and wine service through 2am.

Bridged the PM-to-AM transition by running breakfast Private Dining as order taker, managing the complimentary coffee station, and completing sidework to ensure a seamless handoff to the morning team.

Delivered personalized VIP service to high-profile guests, accommodating off-menu items and stepping into other departments to cover outside service offerings when overnight staffing was limited, in English and Spanish.

experience.title: Server | In Room Dining (IRD) | Busser | Food Runner

highlights.text: Managed dedicated sections during PM shifts by handling opening and closing duties and coordinating with back-servers and bartenders with precision.
Delivered IRD service efficiently while maintaining high-touch, fine-dining standards during PM dinner service.
Ensured attentive service to guests in a ski-in/ski-out mountain setting and upsold alcohol and seasonal promotions to increase check averages.
Served with high-end standards in Banquets, supporting the captain across a variety of events and ensuring seamless setup, service, and breakdown.
Oversaw daily café operations with full key-holder responsibility and coordinated with the purchasing office to manage inventory.
Cultivated guest loyalty by memorizing regulars' custom orders and enhanced service by communicating in multiple languages.

experience.title: Barista | Breakfast Attendant
experience.company: Dancing Bear Residences Owners Association, Inc

highlights.text: Ensured seamless daily operations and a pristine environment by managing supply checklists, restocking stations, and executing meticulous opening and closing procedures.
Enhanced the guest experience through pleasant conversation and demonstrated commitment by volunteering to serve beverages during a New Year's Eve event.
Maximized dining room efficiency by orchestrating seamless food distribution and accelerating table turnover through an efficient process for clearing, sanitizing, and resetting tables.
Elevated the fine-dining experience by providing detailed, high-end presentations of each dish to guests, contributing to greater satisfaction and a more memorable meal.

Streamlined beverage service by efficiently delivering cocktails and drinks to tables and explaining their preparation, allowing servers to focus on wine service and enhancing overall speed of service.
Guaranteed food quality by serving as the critical communication link between the hot station and servers, preventing dishes from getting cold and ensuring correct order delivery.
Maximized food service efficiency by acting as the central point of communication between the kitchen and servers, ensuring timely and accurate delivery of dishes to the correct seats and sections.
Maintained high standards of food quality by providing constant feedback to the kitchen on pacing, resulting in consistently hot and fresh meal presentations.
Relevant coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Software Engineering, Databases
